title: Notch Apple
description: Also known as "God Apple" or "Enchanted Golden Apple", the Notch Apple is a really popular item whose craft recipe was removed in 1.9. This mod simply brings it back on the latest version!
body:
This mod works both on a server and on a client. No need to install it on both to make it work!

it goes straight to the point by adding the old recipe of the Notch Apple, nothing else. 8 golden blocks around 1 apple, just as in the picture below:

![](https://i.imgur.com/blY7EIH.png)

(And yes, it's actually a Notch Apple, even if it does look more like a regular Golden Apple on this screenshot)
